title: cleidion moniliflorum
intro: Cleidion moniliflorum is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits associated with Cleidion moniliflorum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Cleidion moniliflorum are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
